site.title: hkfi
site.description: Portfolio and engineering blog of Hiroki Furuichi, a software engineer building web experiences with TypeScript and Python.

home.tagline: Building web experiences with TypeScript and Python

about.title: About | hkfi
about.seoDescription: About Hiroki Furuichi, a software engineer focused on building performant web experiences.
about.bio1: I'm a <accent>Software Engineer</accent> focused on building fast, user-friendly web products.
about.bio2: I mainly work in TypeScript and Python, and I enjoy turning product ideas into reliable, polished experiences.
about.bio3: When I'm not coding, you can find me traveling 🌍, trying new foods 🍜, and learning languages.
about.perfDescription: This site is built with Astro and Tailwind for fast, content-first pages. Posts are authored in Notion and fetched at build time via the Notion API.

blog.title: Blog | hkfi
blog.seoDescription: Engineering notes on web development, TypeScript, Python, and product-focused software work.
